description: There is no context output for this command.

outputs.name: There is no context output for this command.

Gets the list of incidents that were modified since the last update time. Note that this method is here for debugging purposes. The get-modified-remote-data command is used as part of a Mirroring feature, which is available in Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR from version 6.1.
There is no context output for this command.

outputs.description: To set up the mirroring: Enable Fetching incidents
outputs.name: You can enable incident mirroring between Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR incidents and Netskope (API v2) LOCAL corresponding events (available from Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR version 6.0.0).

outputs.description: In the Mirroring Direction integration parameter, select in which direction the incidents should be mirrored:
outputs.name: in your instance configuration.

outputs.description: Description None Turns off incident mirroring.
outputs.name: Option

outputs.description: Any changes in Netskope (API v2) LOCAL events (mirroring incoming fields) will be reflected in Cortex XSOAR incidents. Outgoing Any changes in Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR incidents will be reflected in Netskope (API v2) LOCAL events (outgoing mirrored fields).
outputs.name: Incoming

outputs.description: Optional: Check the Close Mirrored XSAIM/XSOAR Incident integration parameter to close the Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR incident when the corresponding event is closed in Netskope (API v2) LOCAL.
outputs.name: Incoming and Outgoing

outputs.description: Important Note: To ensure the mirroring works as expected, mappers are required, both for incoming and outgoing, to map the expected fields in Cortex XSAIM/XSOAR and Netskope (API v2) LOCAL. Edit this page
outputs.name: Newly fetched incidents will be mirrored in the chosen direction. However, this selection does not affect existing incidents.
